decisions.decision: Sprint stats join on sprint_name (not sprint_id)
decisions.rationale: 71% of bugs have sprint_id=NULL — sprint_name is reliable in both tables

decisions.decision: state=active,closed,future in Jira Board Sprint API
decisions.rationale: Without it Jira omits closed sprints
If Jira unreachable, serve cached data with stale:true banner

decisions.decision: no_board returns ok:true with empty sprint list
decisions.rationale: Projects without Agile boards (SAM/MLO may not have Scrum boards) are valid — show empty state, not HTTP 400

decisions.decision: View Sprints in project card dropdown (not sidebar)
decisions.rationale: Sidebar removed earlier; dropdown reuses existing cardMenuSync CSS class (green)
Export buttons exist in UI as no-ops; real implementation is Phase 05
WSL2 NTFS path pollution causes worktree files tracked in commits
